name: Case List Performance Fix Workflow
serviceNowSurface: ServiceNow platform diagnostics; no Now Assist surface activated
trigger: Platform engineer initiates a performance diagnostic cycle on the case table list view
businessOutcome: Bring the case list view p95 below 1.2 seconds via structural fixes, with before-after validation on prod-equivalent sub-prod data.
inputs: case table schema and ACL chain
steps: Capture the current p95 latency baseline.
Run read-only ACL and Business Rule diagnostics.
Surface the top 5 offenders with root-cause analysis.
Propose fixes with before-after measurement plan; reject any fix without a measurement plan.
Apply each fix in its own update set in sub-prod.
Validate before-after metrics on prod-equivalent volume.
Promote to prod with a 7-day post-fix monitoring window.
approvalPoints: Each fix update set requires a sign-off
Operations lead sign-off on the rollout window
Enterprise Architect Agent sign-off on cross-table changes
failureStates: Diagnostic returns no offender above the noise threshold: workflow halts and asks for a different reproduction case.
Fix worsens p95 in sub-prod: revert update set; restart from diagnostics with new data.
DBA flags index proposal as unsafe: hold and seek a non-index alternative.
auditNotes: Before-after metrics archived for one year.
Decision to NOT add Now Assist surface recorded with rationale.
tests: p95 below 1.2 seconds achieved on prod-equivalent sub-prod.
Before-after metrics present for every fix.
Workflow does not propose any Now Assist surface.
PA snapshot diff shows the offender removed.
